name: @demod/dcf-wire
description: DeMoD DCF 17-byte DeModFrame wire codec + SuperPack + Reed-Solomon FEC — certified Node.js binding
author: DeMoD LLC

scripts.certify: node test/certify.js && node test/certify_superpack.js && node test/certify_fec.js && node test/certify_text.js
scripts.test: node test/certify.js && node test/certify_superpack.js && node test/certify_fec.js && node test/certify_text.js
